message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
actor User
participant "«analysis»\nEditVariablesUI" as EditVariablesUI
participant "«analysis»\nUIController" as UIController
participant "«analysis»\nw: Workbook" as w_Workbook
participant "«analysis»\nlist: List<Variable>" as list_Variables
participant "«analysis»\nVariable" as Variable

User -> EditVariablesUI : Edit variables\n
activate EditVariablesUI
    EditVariablesUI->>w_Workbook:w = getActiveWorkbook()\n
    activate w_Workbook
        w_Workbook-->EditVariablesUI:list = getVariables() \n
    deactivate w_Workbook
    
loop 
  alt  
     edit_variables_UI -->edit_variables_UI:addItem(Variable)\n   
   end    
end loop 

deactivate EditVariablesUI


User -> EditVariablesUI : Selects a variable and changes the value\n
activate EditVariablesUI
    EditVariablesUI->>Variable:setvalue(newValue) \n
    activate Variable
        
@enduml
